news.title: Gold Rises on Weaker U.S. Jobs Data, Lower Oil Prices
news.summary: Gold futures were rising after posting their first weekly gain since May, as weaker U.S. jobs data and lower oil prices reduced expectations of interest-rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. The sharp drop in crude prices—driven by the recovery of flows through the Strait of Hormuz and OPEC+'s decision to hike output—eased concerns over inflationary pressures and strengthened the case for lower interest rates, providing a tailwind for non-yielding assets.

news.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy Is Trapped by Its Own Broken Bitcoin Math
news.summary: Strategy  the bitcoin-hoarding company led by Chairman  Michael Saylor,  is caught in a math trap of its own making.  Saylor has trained investors to believe Strategy’s model for acquiring bitcoins would work so long as the market valued the company at a premium to the value of its bitcoin holdings.  Strategy even created a bespoke metric called mNAV to track the premium.

news.title: SpaceX Is About to Join the Nasdaq-100. Here’s How Exposed You’ll Be.
news.summary: SpaceX  will officially join the Nasdaq-100 on Tuesday, and investors holding some funds tied to the index will end up exposed whether they like it or not.  Mutual and exchange-traded funds with a collective $800 billion in assets under management that track Nasdaq’s flagship tech index, including the popular  ETF, are set to buy SpaceX shares at Monday’s closing price in order to mirror the index’s performance.

news.title: Greatland Resources, Valereum, Avon Technologies, Krakatoa Resources - Small Cap Snapshot
news.summary: Greatland Resources Ltd (AIM:GGP, OTC:GRLGF, FRA:G8G, ASX:GGP) has topped its full-year gold production guidance, turning out nearly 329,000 ounces for the year. Cash has also climbed to almost $1.3 billion with no debt. Valereum Plc (AQSE:VLRM, OTCQB:VLRMF) says its digital asset partner QGP has issued its VCORE+ tokens on the XRP Ledger, but key operational milestones have been missed. The board says it's reviewing all options and has reserved its legal rights under the agreement. Avon Technologies (LSE:AVON) has picked up a $10.8 million NATO order to supply FM50 respirators to a European member state. The deal was placed through the NATO Support and Procurement Agency and reinforces the company's expectations for 2027. Krakatoa Resources Ltd (ASX:KTA, LSE:AIM:) has raised A$1.6 million to fund exploration at its Zopkhito antimony-gold project in Georgia. The funds will support resource definition drilling, metallurgical work and preliminary mining studies at a project hosting over 800,000 ounces of gold.
